title: Justin Hammer
content:
{{CharHub|Justin Hammer|Justin Hammer}} {{Character |image = Iron man 2 50.jpg |real name = Justin Hammer |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |title = [[United States Department of Defense|DOD]] Primary Systems Contractor (formerly)
CEO of [[Hammer Industries]] (formerly) |affiliation = {{Affiliation|DOD}} (formerly)
{{Affiliation|HMI}} (formerly) |movie = ''[[Iron Man 2]]'' |tv series = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Luke Cage (TV series)|Luke Cage]]'' (mentioned)
''[[Secret Invasion (TV series)|Secret Invasion]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |oneshot = ''[[All Hail the King]]'' |comic = {{Infobox List|''[[Iron Man 2: Public Identity]]''
{{Collapse|''[[The Avengers Prelude: Fury's Big Week]]'' (mentioned)
''[[The Avengers: Black Widow Strikes]]'' (mentioned)
}}''[[Iron Man 2 Adaptation]]''
{{Collapse|''[[Iron Man 3 Prelude]]'' (mentioned)
''[[Iron Man: The Coming of the Melter]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |book = {{Infobox List|''[[Iron Man 2 Read-Along Storybook and CD]]''
{{Collapse|''[[The Wakanda Files: A Technological Exploration of the Avengers and Beyond]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |actor = [[Sam Rockwell]] |status = In Custody}} {{Quote|You know, we live in a world of grave threats, threats that [[Iron Man|Mr. Stark]] will not always be able to foresee. Thank you. God bless Iron Man. God bless [[United States of America|America]].|Justin Hammer|Iron Man 2}} '''Justin Hammer''' is a military contractor and the former CEO of [[Hammer Industries]], who had formed an intense business rivalry with [[Stark Industries]]. Seeking to improve his position and attack [[Tony Stark]], Hammer had worked alongside [[Stern]] and attempted to damage the public's view of Stark; however, this all backfired, and Hammer's public image was highly damaged. Furious at Stark for this failure, Hammer then recruited [[Ivan Vanko]], the convicted terrorist, to attempt to replicate Stark's [[Arc Reactor]] technology, but this backfired as well when Vanko betrayed Hammer, leading to Hammer’s incarceration inside [[Seagate Penitentiary]] for his involvement in Vanko's actions. ==Biography== ===Challenging Iron Man=== ====Aerodynamic Marvel==== {{Quote|Besides, I can't help it if [[Tony Stark|Stark]] won't play ball with the military and I will, speaking of which, hello genius. Beautiful isn't it, an [[Aerodynamic Marvel]]. The next step in close quarter combat, full protection and attack capabilities.|Justin Hammer to [[James Rhodes]]|Iron Man 2: Public Identity}} [[File:Ross angry.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer works with [[Thaddeus Ross]]]] In an attempt to discredit [[Tony Stark]]'s Iron Man, [[Thaddeus Ross]] soon hired Justin Hammer to develop a single pilot close-quarter combat vehicle with full protection and attack capabilities. Soon, both Hammer and Ross presented the vehicle to [[Stern]] in [[Washington, D.C.]] and [[James Rhodes]].{{Ref|IM2PI2}} However, despite Hammer's claims that the vehicle was not vulnerable to surface-to-air attacks, the [[Congolese Army]] was able to shoot the plane down during its first mission, leaving the pilot alone in hostile territory, leading to Stark being sent in to successfully rescue the pilot.{{Ref|IM2PI3}} ====Recreating the Iron Man Suit==== {{Quote|Right leg up, higher, arm up, right arm. Okay, left, turn to the right. Oh shit!|Justin Hammer|Iron Man 2}} Hammer again attempted to discredit [[Tony Stark]] by secretly focusing [[Hammer Industries]]' resources into building their own version of the Iron Man suit with a new [[Arc Reactor]], which was something many governments were attempting to do. The [[Feebles|prototypes]] were unsuccessful, however, and during one test flight, the suit malfunctioned, twisting the pilot's body and seriously damaging his spine, although he managed to survive the incident.{{Ref|IM2}} ====Meeting with the Senate==== [[File:Justin Hammer.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer testifies against [[Tony Stark]]]] {{Quote|In the last six months, [[Anthony Stark]] has created a [[Iron Man Armor: Mark IV|sword]] with untold possibilities, and yet he insists it's a shield. He asks that we trust him as we cower behind it. I wish I were comforted, Anthony, I really do. I'd love to leave my door unlocked when I leave the house, but this ain't [[Canada]].|Justin Hammer|Iron Man 2}} Hammer was called as an expert to prove that [[Tony Stark]]'s ego and his monopoly on his [[Iron Man]] armor was now a danger for the [[United States of America]], as part of [[Stern]]'s attempt to force Stark to give the Iron Man suit technology to the government. Hammer argued that all Stark's efforts as the Iron Man were not good enough to protect the world, noting that due to the creation of Iron Man, there would be threats which Stark would not be able to foresee, claiming Stark keeping the armor was selfish and dangerous. [[File:Ironman2 0771.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer listens to [[James Rhodes]]' statement]] Hammer then took his seat as [[James Rhodes]] was called to the stand and asked to read out sections on his reports on Iron Man, in Stern's attempt to discredit Stark with his own friend's words. As Hammer remained silent and confident, Stern attempted to prove his point as he showed the many [[Feebles|attempts]] by America's enemies to replicate Iron Man's armor, claiming the technology should be in the government's hands, while under [[Hammer Industries]]' close supervision. [[File:JHammer-DefendingActions.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer is utterly humiliated by [[Tony Stark]]]] However, Hammer was then humiliated by Stark, who proceeded to use [[J.A.R.V.I.S.]] to hack the screens and show Hammer attempting to also recreate the [[Arc Reactor]] and armor technology, but ending up injuring the pilot's spine. Hammer tried to save face by confirming the pilot's survival but Stark won the case and confidently walked out of [[Washington, D.C.]]. After his public humiliation, Hammer's weapons contract with the [[United States Armed Forces]] was suspended.{{Ref|IM2}} ====[[Duel of Monaco]]==== [[File:Potts Stark Hammer Everhart.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer meets with [[Tony Stark]] in [[Monaco]]]] {{Quote|I love [[Tony Stark]]. Tony loves me. We’re not competitors. Him being out of the picture created tremendous opportunities for [[Hammer Industries]], you know? Everything that Tony and I do... is a healthy... competition.|Justin Hammer to [[Christine Everhart]]|Iron Man 2}} Later, Hammer met with [[Tony Stark]] and [[Pepper Potts]] again as they were both in [[Monaco]], where both of them were supporting one of the cars involved in the upcoming race. Hammer had come to the race with [[Christine Everhart]], a journalist who was flirting with him for having some scoops about the new current status of his own company, [[Hammer Industries]] and an interview for her magazine, ''[[Vanity Fair]]''; however, before the interview started, she was told by Stark that Hammer lost his own contract with the [[United States Armed Forces]], forcing Hammer to then defend his companies' future. [[File:JHammer-EverhartInterview.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer is interviewed by [[Christine Everhart]]]] As Hammer's interview with Everhart went underway, he attempted to claim that Stark's comments were merely playful banter between the pair and that Hammer Industries and [[Stark Industries]] were still continuing a close relationship. they noticed on the television that Stark had taken control of his own car and decided to race it himself. This led to Everhart quickly making excuses and leaving the interview to follow up this story instead, much to Hammer's annoyance. [[File:JHammer-WatchingRace.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer watches [[Whiplash]] fighting [[Iron Man]]]] Having been left alone, Hammer then watched the race unfold and witnessed [[Ivan Vanko]] step onto the track with his own weaponized [[Whiplash Armor: Mark I|armor]] complete with electrified whips and attempt to assassinate Stark by cutting his car in half and causing it to crash. While most people around him watched in horror as Stark battled against Vanko, Hammer studied the terrorist's technology closely to try and understand how it had been made by Vanko. [[File:Justin-Hammer-watches-TV.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer decides to recruit [[Ivan Vanko]]]] Stark survived the [[Duel of Monaco|attack]] when [[Happy Hogan]] had successfully driven onto the track and given him his [[Iron Man Armor: Mark V|Mark V Armor]] and Vanko was then arrested, but Hammer saw an opportunity in finding someone who had successfully made a new [[Arc Reactor]] powered suit, considering how to build his own combat armors. While Vanko was being taken away into custody, Hammer immediately began making calls in order to arrange his escape from prison so they could meet.{{Ref|IM2}} ====[[Escape from Batiment B3|Prison Break]]==== [[File:Justinhammer-ironman2.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer introduces himself to [[Ivan Vanko]]]] {{Quote|I couldn't bear to have you shipped off to God knows where. It would have been such a waste of talent. But if I might make a suggestion, you know, you don't just go and try to kill [[Iron Man|the guy]]. I think, if I may, you go after his legacy. That's what you kill.|Justin Hammer to [[Ivan Vanko]]|Iron Man 2}} Hammer had [[Ivan Vanko]] freed from prison and his death to be faked before he took him to his personal secret storage facility where they could talk in private. Once Vanko was taken out of the van he had been taken in, Hammer greeted him with a table filled with dinner and smiled upon his arrival, telling the guards to remove his handcuffs as a sign of friendship before inviting Vanko to sit down with him and eat dinner. [[File:Ironman2 2504.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer explains how to destroy [[Tony Stark]]]] While Vanko tried to understand why Hammer had brought him there, Hammer explained that upon seeing all that Vanko had done to [[Tony Stark]] during the recent [[Duel of Monaco]], he had become impressed and wanted to take advantage of Vanko's talents at outdoing Stark's own [[Arc Reactor]] technology. [[File:J. Hammer.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer makes his new deal with [[Ivan Vanko]]]] Vanko showed he was interested as Hammer explained to Vanko that he had to build for him many [[Hammer Drones|armors]] so advanced that Iron Man's would become old news. Vanko agreed, although there was a brief moment when Hammer believed that Vanko only spoke Russian which he then explained he did not. Vanko agreed to do all this for Hammer as long as Hammer arranged to have his pet bird flown in from [[Russia]], which Hammer then agreed to do for him.{{Ref|IM2}} ====Recruiting Ivan Vanko==== [[File:JHammer-IVankoHacking.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer gives [[Ivan Vanko]] a warehouse tour]] {{Quote|I want [[Hammer Drones|them]] to put me in the [[Pentagon]] for the next twenty-five years. I wanna make [[Iron Man]] look like an antique. I wanna go to that [[Stark Expo]] and take a dump in Tony Stark's front yard.|Justin Hammer to [[Ivan Vanko]]|Iron Man 2}} As they toured the [[Hammer Industries Headquarters]], Hammer then proudly showed off all of his [[Hammer Drones|Hammer Armors]] to [[Ivan Vanko]]. Vanko examined all the prototype suits, pulling the head off one to examine the inside, much to Hammer's horror when he considered the cost of that prototype. Vanko then hacked into the facilities' own security systems with little effort and even called all of it shit. [[File:Justin-Hammer.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer and [[Ivan Vanko]] discuss their plan]] As Vanko asked him what exactly he wanted, Hammer explained that he wanted to finally make [[Tony Stark]] irrelevant in the modern age of weapons, so [[Hammer Industries]] could then take over as the key weapons supplier for all of the [[United States Armed Forces]] and take over from [[Stark Industries]]. Vanko seemed to agree with Hammer's plans and agreed to do the work to improve his technology so that Stark and his own company could lose their credibility.{{Ref|IM2}} ====Ivan Vanko's Ideas==== [[File:Ironman2 3666.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer gives [[Ivan Vanko]] his new pet bird]] {{Quote|That's not a helmet, it's a head. I need to get a guy in there, I need to put a person in that in that suit. You understand?"
"[[Hammer Drones|Drone]] better."
"What? Drone better? Why is drone better?|Justin Hammer and [[Ivan Vanko]]|Iron Man 2}} Over the next few days, [[Ivan Vanko]] worked tirelessly inside [[Hammer Industries Headquarters]] on designing the newest suits for Hammer. As a reward, Hammer then brought in a [[Irina|bird]], claiming it to be Vanko's own from [[Russia]]. However, after only examining the new bird for just a moment, Vanko noted that this was not his own bird but a new bird, which Hammer was forced to admit was the case. [[File:JHammer-DiscussingDrones.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer is given the [[Hammer Drones]] instead]] When Hammer noticed that his armors had now been redesigned, he told [[Jack (Hammer Industries)|Jack]] to try to wear the suit to demonstrate that it was no longer wearable which did not seem to bother Vanko. Remaining confident, Vanko told Hammer that building the new [[Hammer Drones]] was the best choice, and convinced him that drones were better than armors as people made problems. Hammer believed Vanko's claims, but he did not realize Vanko was making them for his purposes.{{Ref|IM2}} ====Upgrading War Machine==== [[File:JHammer-LollyPop.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer has a meeting with [[James Rhodes]]]] {{Quote|I'll take it."
"Which one?"
"All of it.|[[James Rhodes]] and Justin Hammer|Iron Man 2}} Hammer was contacted by [[Meade]] who had just recently received [[Tony Stark]]'s own [[Iron Man Armor: Mark II|Mark II Armor]] as he had been taken into the custody of the [[United States Air Force]] by [[James Rhodes]]. Seeking to upgrade the armor for the military, Meade had summoned Hammer to [[Edwards Air Force Base]] to improve and weaponize the suit, much to the utter delight of Hammer who came straight there to make the deal in order to see the suit. [[File:Justin Hammer with gun.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer shows weapons to [[James Rhodes]]]] Taking great delight at the chance to personally design the new armor, Hammer then proceeded to demonstrate all of the weapons he would use in order to weaponize the armor with the best of the weapons produced by [[Hammer Industries]]. Seeing that Rhodes and Meade were not overly impressed by the machine guns he was showing off, which even included a mini-gun, Hammer eventually showed them the [[Ex-Wife Missile]] which he had described as strong enough to destroy even the strongest enemy bunker with a single strike, believing this would be enough to win him the job to work on and redesign one of Stark's armors with his technology. [[File:JHammer-ICantReadYou.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer agrees to upgrade the [[Iron Man Armor: Mark II|Mark II]]]] Having shown off every weapon that Hammer Industries had to offer, Hammer turned to Rhodes and simply asked what he was thinking, noting that he could not get any read of Rhodes' facial expression. However, Rhodes noted he would take not just some of the weapons but all of them, leading to Hammer creating [[War Machine Armor: Mark I|Mark I Armor]], which he intended to introduce the [[Hammer Drones]] at the [[Stark Expo]] during his upcoming showcase of all of his newest technology.{{Ref|IM2}} ===Fall From Grace=== ====Betrayed by Ivan Vanko==== [[File:Hammer-73.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer playing golf with Senator [[Stern]]]] {{Quote|When I get back, we're gonna renegotiate the terms of our agreement. And you're gonna make good on our arrangement because if you don't, you're gonna be exactly what you were when I found you – a dead man.|Justin Hammer to [[Ivan Vanko]]|Iron Man 2}} While playing another round of golf with [[Stern]], Hammer was contacted by [[Ivan Vanko]] with an update on the design of the new [[Hammer Drones]], wanting to know what they would be capable of doing at the [[Stark Expo]] presentation. Vanko informed him that he would only be able to make them salute and not fire their weapons, much to Hammer's dismay as he needed something better. [[File:JHammer-MarchingForward.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer prepares to confront [[Ivan Vanko]]]] Furious about having been lied to and let down by Vanko, Hammer stormed into the [[Hammer Industries Headquarters]] and straight into Vanko's room where he found Vanko relaxing with the bird Hammer had given him. Hammer confronted Vanko with two security guards, ordering his men to take Vanko's bird, shoes and pillow away from him to demonstrate how it felt to have his things stolen from you, all while Vanko remained calm and silent as Hammer yelled. [[File:Ironman2 5197.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer yells at [[Ivan Vanko]] for his betrayal]] Having made him suitably uncomfortable, Hammer then told Vanko that he was now heading onto the [[Stark Expo]] to demonstrate the [[Hammer Drones]] and a new [[War Machine Armor: Mark I|War Machine Armor]] as well, and when Vanko spoke back to him in Russian, Hammer just yelled again about him not understanding what Vanko was now saying. Hammer then confidently left Vanko with his guards to watch over him, leaving for the Expo Demonstration, hoping to have sex while there.{{Ref|IM2}} ====[[Battle at Stark Expo]]==== [[File:JHammer-SmugPresentation.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer gives his speech at the [[Stark Expo]]]] {{Quote|Ladies and gentlemen, for far too long, [[United States of America|this country]] has had to place its brave men and women in harm's way. But then the [[Iron Man]] arrived, and we thought the days of losing lives were behind us. Sadly, that technology was kept out of reach. That's not fair.|Justin Hammer|Iron Man 2}} As Hammer attended the [[Stark Expo]], he stepped onto the stage with a brief and goofy introduction where confidently he danced on stage to music, trying to one-up [[Tony Stark]]'s own presentation a few months earlier. Hammer told the audience how the Iron Man technology had failed to save all the lives on their soldiers overseas, promising he had the solution for saving thousands of American lives. [[File:JHammer-and-your-drones.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer showing off all his [[Hammer Drones]]]] Promising to present the newspapers with an even more impressive story, Hammer proudly showed off all the newest technology from [[Hammer Industries]] as all of the [[Hammer Drones]] were presented to the audience. Hammer explained how the Drones could be used by all of the branches of the [[United States Armed Forces]] in order to replace the soldiers on the ground as well as in the Navy, Air Force, and Marine Corps. As the audience cheered and clapped for the drones, Hammer became even more confident as he began charging around the stage to present the drones as they rose onto the stage. [[File:JHammer-Salute.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer presenting the [[War Machine]] armor]] Finally, Hammer explained that he would always have a key role for a human at the command of his new army of Hammer Drones and then presented the [[War Machine Armor: Mark I|War Machine Armor]], while also introducing [[James Rhodes]] as the pilot of the armor. With his drones and the War Machine on stage, Hammer gave a salute which was greeted by one in return from all of the Drones, as promised, while Hammer vowed that his drones would protect the American people. [[File:Justin-Hammer-speaks-to-Iron-Man.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer is furiously confronted by [[Iron Man]]]] The demonstration was interrupted by Stark, who has discovered that Hammer was working with [[Ivan Vanko]]. Hammer initially tried to play off the situation and nervously deny all knowledge of Vanko's survival, but Vanko remotely took control of the Drones and of Rhodes' armor, starting a massive [[Battle at Stark Expo|attack on the Expo]]. As the attack started, Hammer dove to safety off the stage as his drones fired upon the audience causing a large battle to unfold.{{Ref|IM2}} ====Arrested==== [[File:Ironman2 6001.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer attempts to locate [[Ivan Vanko]]]] {{Quote|Listen, we got to get these bitches out of here. What?"
"You tell me who's behind this. Who's behind this?"
"[[Ivan Vanko]].|Justin Hammer and [[Natasha Romanoff]]|Iron Man 2}} While [[Iron Man]] defended himself from the attack during the [[Battle at Stark Expo]], Hammer sought to right his wrongs and come out better from the attack, so he attempted to have all of his technicians regain control of all the [[Hammer Drones]] as well as the [[War Machine Armor: Mark I|War Machine Armor]], finding that the pass-codes had now been changed so they were locked out of the system and unable to shut down the drones, so Hammer suggested that they try entering the codes in Russian to find the right answer. [[File:JHammer-vs-BlackWidow.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer is questioned by [[Natasha Romanoff]]]] Hammer's attempts to resolve the situation were soon halted by the arrival of both [[Pepper Potts]] and [[Natasha Romanoff]], whom Hammer demanded leave so his men could continue their work. As Hammer was refusing to help, Romanoff took the matter into her own hands, pinning Hammer down and forced him to reveal [[Ivan Vanko]]'s location at the [[Hammer Industries Headquarters]] by slamming his head onto the table and twisting his arm painfully backwards. [[File:Ironman2 6369.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer is arrested for all of his many crimes]] While Romanoff and [[Happy Hogan]] went to confront Vanko, Potts, in turn, called the police and had Hammer arrested for his complicity with Vanko. As he was taken away, Hammer assured her that this was no problem for him and he would be back and vowed revenge against both Stark and Potts. While Hammer was taken into custody, his Hammer Drones were destroyed and Vanko was killed during his final battle against Iron Man and War Machine.{{Ref|IM2}} ====Life in Seagate Penitentiary==== [[File:Pepper Cover AHTK.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer incarcerated in [[Seagate Penitentiary|Seagate Prison]]]] {{Quote|[[Tony Stark|Tony]] and I... Tony's cool. Tony and I, we have an understanding. We're both brothers in arms, you know. Literally. We were both arms dealers. We're both good looking. We both have nice hair. We both have boats. I used to have a boat. Well, anyway...|Justin Hammer|Marvel One-Shot: All Hail the King}} Justin Hammer was sent to [[Seagate Penitentiary]] after being arrested at the [[Stark Expo]].{{Ref|MOSAHtK}} His stay at Seagate was kept a secret from a part of the inmate population, though rumors still persisted of a millionaire residing somewhere within the prison.{{Ref|LC104}} [[File:Justin Hammer in prison.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hammer and his boyfriend inside [[Seagate Penitentiary|Seagate]]]] While being interviewed for a documentary, Hammer, who had apparently developed a relationship with his co-inmate, stated that he resented [[Trevor Slattery]] and felt that he should be more recognized. During the interview, his partner made a gesture to him which he dismissed. At the same time, he was reading a ''[[Forbes]]'' magazine with [[Pepper Potts]] featured on the cover.{{Ref|MOSAHtK}} {{Clear}} ==Abilities== *'''Expert Businessperson''': [[File:Ironman2 5429.jpg|thumb|250px|Hammer presenting his [[Hammer Drones|Drones]]]] Hammer is an exceptional businessman, running an industry of sufficient standing to be a rival for [[Stark Industries]] and possess government and military contracts. Hammer had hoped to use [[Ivan Vanko]] to create [[Arc Reactor]]s for [[Hammer Industries]] when he saw the business opportunities that that technology provided. During the [[Stark Expo]], Hammer had put on a show of some dance moves in order to get the attention put on him and his company. He then proceeded to reveal his [[Hammer Drones]] with military songs playing over it so that the [[United States Armed Forces]] believe it's the right choice for them. His business was even successful after he got arrested. His weapons were pivotal in [[Cottonmouth]]'s reign as well. {{Quote|This that grade A, military, Justin Hammer-level shit.|[[Cottonmouth]]|Moment of Truth}} *'''Expert Engineer''': Although not at the same level as [[Tony Stark]], Hammer is still an accomplished engineer, having created many weapons deemed to be the equivalent of a grade A military weapon that has impressed the United States government, replacing Stark Industries when it stopped creating them. Among his inventions are the [[Aerodynamic Marvel]], the [[Battle Tank]], and the [[Ex-Wife Missile]]. Although the ex-wife missile did not work. He also was not able to create good enough armor to replace [[:Category: Iron Man Armors|Iron Man's Armor]], so he had to enlist the help of [[Ivan Vanko]], who made [[Hammer Drones]]. *'''Tactician''': Hammer used a plan to recruit [[Ivan Vanko]] so that he could use him. This plan included sending a man into Vanko's cell and then having Vanko blow it up to make others believe he had died in the explosion. Upon meeting Vanko, he tasked him with creating [[:Category: Iron Man Armors|Iron Man Armor]] for [[Hammer Industries]]. However, Hammer proved to be outmatched in this position as Vanko crossed him and ultimately got Hammer arrested. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== {{Quote|Size does matter, don't let anyone tell you differently. This is an M134 7.62 Minigun, six invidual barrels, the torso taker, powder maker. Our boys in uniform call in Uncle Gazpacho or Puff the Magic Dragon.|Justin Hammer to [[James Rhodes]]|Iron Man 2}} [[File:Hammer's Arsenal.png|thumb|250px|Hammer showing off his arsenal of weapons]] *'''{{WPS|Claridge Hi-Tec/Goncz Pistol|Claridge Hi-Tec Semi-automatic 9mm Pistol}}''': Hammer presented this weapon to the military, but quickly realized it wasn't suitable. *'''{{WPS|Kimel AP-9}}''': Hammer presented this to the military, but got no response from [[James Rhodes]]. *'''{{WPS|M26 Modular Accessory Shotgun System|M24 Shotgun}}''': Hammer tried to sell this weapon to the unimpressed [[James Rhodes]], *'''{{WPS|FN F2000}}''': Hammer proudly showed this to [[James Rhodes]], cocking the weapon back during his presentation. *'''{{WPS|Milkor MGL|Milkor MGL Mk 1L}}''': Hammer explained that you can put any grenade in this, tear, frag, smoke, anything. *'''{{WPS|Minigun|M134 Minigun}}''': One of Hammer's last weapons in his presentation with the minigun, but became annoyed because [[James Rhodes]] had no reaction. Rhodes then bought all of them. ==Designs== *'''[[Aerodynamic Marvel]]''': Hammer presented the Marvel to the military, which they used. However, it crashed and the pilot was taken by pirates. [[Iron Man]] saved the pirate while Hammer was left to deal with the consequences. *'''[[Hammer Drones]]''': Hammer created a line of manned suits that were supposed to replace [[Iron Man]]. However, he could not make them functional which caused injury to one of his employees, so he recruited [[Ivan Vanko]] to improve them. {{Quote|This is my [[Eiffel Tower]]. This is my Rachmaninoff's Third. My Piéta. It's completely elegant, it's bafflingly beautiful, and it's capable of reducing the population of any standing structure to zero.|Justin Hammer to [[James Rhodes]]|Iron Man 2}} *'''[[Ex-Wife Missile|Sidewinder "Ex-Wife" Missile]]''': Prized by Hammer as one of his greatest creations, he claimed the Ex-Wife missive was capable of leveling several stories. Despite its hype, the missile failed to do anything during Rhodes' showdown with Whiplash. *'''[[Battle Tank]]''': Hammer designed a battle tank which the [[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]] got access to. ==Facilities== *'''[[United States Capitol]]''': Hammer attended the Senate meeting where Tony Stark was summoned to hand over his suit tchnology so the armed forces could utilize them. Hammer testified against him but was humiliated by Stark, something that led to his government contract being suspended.{{Ref|IM2}} *'''[[Circuit de Monaco]]''': Hammer went to the Monaco Grand Prix while [[Christine Everhart]] was writing a piece on him for [[Vanity Fair]]. Hammer saw [[Ivan Vanko]]'s attack on [[Iron Man]] and decided to recruit him. {{Quote|This is my humble abode.|Justin Hammer to [[Ivan Vanko]]|Iron Man 2}} *'''[[Hammer Industries Headquarters]]''': As the CEO and founder of [[Hammer Industries]], Hammer spent a lot of time at their headquarters. Among with other Hammer products, he stored the [[Hammer Drones|Hammer Drone]] lines here. *'''[[Edwards Air Force Base]]''': Hammer presented many weapons to the military at the base, including the [[Ex-Wife Missile]]. ===Prisons=== *'''[[Seagate Penitentiary]]''': Following his arrest Hammer was detained at the penitentiary, where he was living in relative anonymity despite his status as a millionaire. He seems to be in a relationship with a fellow inmate. ==Vehicles== {{Quote|I used to have a boat.|Justin Hammer|Marvel One-Shot: All Hail the King}} *'''Boat''': Hammer reminisced to his boyfriend of a boat which he used to own, before he was incarcerated in [[Seagate Penitentiary]].{{Ref|MOSAHtK}} ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *Sister{{Ref|IM2DS}} *[[Timmy (Nephew)|Timmy]] - Nephew{{Ref|IM2DS}} ===Allies=== *[[Hammer Industries]] **[[Jack (Hammer Industries)|Jack]] - Butler **[[Troy McGatlin]] † *[[United States Congress]] **{{WPS|United States Senate Committee on Armed Services}} ***[[Larson]] ***[[Elkin]] ***[[Stern]] ***[[Busard]] ***[[Gibson (Senator)|Gibson]] ***[[Clements]] ***[[Goodwin]] ***[[Carlino]] ***[[Beckman]] *[[United States Army]] **[[Thaddeus Ross]] *[[United States Air Force]] **[[Meade]] **[[Julius Allen]] *[[Stern]] *[[Christine Everhart]] - Interviewer *[[Fletcher Heggs]] - Fellow Inmate *Boyfriend {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Stark Industries]] - Business Rivals **[[Iron Man|Tony Stark/Iron Man]] † **[[Pepper Potts]] **[[Happy Hogan]] *[[Whiplash|Ivan Vanko/Whiplash]] † - Former Ally *[[War Machine|James Rhodes/War Machine]] - Former Ally *[[Black Widow|Natasha Romanoff/Black Widow]] † - Former Employee *[[New York City Police Department]] *[[Trevor Slattery]] - Former Fellow Inmate *[[White Power Dave]] - Fellow Inmate {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" width="100%" ! Appearances for Justin Hammer |- | {{Scroll box|content= In chronological order: *{{Appearance|IM2PI1}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|IM2PI2}} *{{Appearance|IM2PI3}} *{{Appearance|IM2}} **{{Appearance|IM2A1}} **{{Appearance|IM2A2}} **{{Appearance|TAPFBW3}} (mentioned; concurrent events) **{{Appearance|IM2RASaCD}} *{{Appearance|TAPFBW4}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|TABWS2}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|IM3P1}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|IM3P2}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|IMTCotM}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|LC104}} (indirectly mentioned; flashbacks) *{{Appearance|MOSAHtK}} *{{Appearance|LC101}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|LC105}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|LC107}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|SI102}} (mentioned) }} |} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Justin Hammer is much older and more cynical than his MCU counterpart, and his hatred of [[Tony Stark]] is much more apparent. The reason for this change was to create a more anti-Tony Stark-type character by having him around the same age. *Following the end of ''[[All Hail the King]]'', Hammer is retroactively revealed to be the first confirmed male LGBTQ+ character in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *According to Sam Rockwell, his casting for the part mostly came about as a result of his acquaintance with ''Iron Man 2'' writer [[Justin Theroux]], who he consciously approached to ask him for a role on the film, as well as his co-starring role with [[Jon Favreau]] on the film ''G-Force''.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=thyq-LuRcOw Sam Rockwell talks THE WHITE LOTUS, IRON MAN 2, CHARLIE'S ANGELS, Philip Seymour Hoffman] *In the early storyboards for ''[[Iron Man 2]]'', Justin Hammer was killed by [[War Machine]] while he was controlled by [[Whiplash]].[https://www.comicbookmovie.com/iron_man/did-marvel-originally-plan-for-war-machine-to-kill-justin-hammer-in-iron-man-2-a72576 Did Marvel Originally Plan For War Machine To Kill Justin Hammer In IRON MAN 2?] *[[Ryan Babbs]] was a stand-in for [[Sam Rockwell]] in the role of Justin Hammer. *[[Marvel Comics (publisher)]] writer {{WPS|Bob Layton}}, one of the creators of Justin Hammer, disliked Hammer's portrayal in ''[[Iron Man 2]]'', citing that his comical tendencies were a black mark for his original character.[https://www.boblayton.com/interview-with-bob-by-dolmen-magazine/ Interview with Bob by Dolmen Magazine] *When asked if there are any plans to bring back Justin Hammer, [[Kevin Feige]] replied that there's a possibility as he loves to bring back characters the audience think they have seen the last of.[https://www.reddit.com/r/marvelstudios/comments/bp084n/hi_reddit_im_kevin_feige_amaa/ Kevin Feige Reddit AMA] Sam Rockwell would later confirm that there were talks about him reprising the role for a series.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=thyq-LuRcOw Sam Rockwell talks THE WHITE LOTUS, IRON MAN 2, CHARLIE'S ANGELS, Philip Seymour Hoffman]
